description.fr_FR: Plugin pour piloter les équipements de la gamme Smart Home (CH) : myStrom (switches, boutons, ampoules, détecteurs PIR, bandeaux LED), Dingz (interrupteurs Wi-Fi)
description.en_US: Plugin to control Smart Home (CH) devices: myStrom (switches, buttons, bulbs, PIR sensors, LED strips), Dingz (Wi-Fi switches)
description.es_ES: Plugin para controlar los dispositivos Smart Home (CH): myStrom (interruptores, botones, bombillas, sensores PIR, tiras LED), Dingz (interruptores Wi-Fi)
description.de_DE: Plugin zur Steuerung von Smart Home (CH)-Geräten: myStrom (Schalter, Taster, Lampen, PIR-Sensoren, LED-Streifen), Dingz (WLAN-Schalter)
description.it_IT: Plugin per controllare i dispositivi Smart Home (CH): myStrom (interruttori, pulsanti, lampadine, sensori PIR, strisce LED), Dingz (interruttori Wi-Fi)
description.pt_PT: Plugin para controlar dispositivos Smart Home (CH): myStrom (interruptores, botões, lâmpadas, sensores PIR, fitas LED), Dingz (interruptores Wi-Fi)
